name: Fractal Gaming Group AB (publ)
summary: Fractal Gaming Group AB (publ) offers PC gaming products worldwide. The company's products include cases, power supply units, water cooling products, fans, and accessories for gaming computers. Fractal Gaming Group AB (publ) was founded in 2010 and is based in Gothenburg, Sweden with its additional locations at Dallas, Texas; Dongguan, China; and Taiwan, Taipei.
